page_metadata.biotools__summary: MeDBA is an integrated, distinctive, practicable, user-friendly metalloenzyme data bank and analysis platform. It comprehensively integrates information regarding metalloenzymes, ligands, metalloenzyme-ligand associations with metalloenzyme-specific computational analysis tools.
